edit_summary: Added AC-015 (per-tool contract-schema acceptance for all 8 core tools, REQ-002), AC-016 (root immutability verification, REQ-007), AC-017 (named error paths not-found/not-sdd-root/too-large, REQ-005/006) to acceptance-tests.md and mirrored them in the requirements.md AC list, addressing round-1 findings GOAL-AC-TRACE (A) and EDGE-CASE-COVERAGE/DOWNSTREAM-READINESS (B).
